purpose: Claude Code skill definition for `dashboard-ops`. It describes trigger conditions, workflow, constraints, and referenced protocol files for that skill. Key content: --- name: dashboard-ops description: > Monitor, inspect, and operate Synapse swarms. Handles status checks, log viewing, task inspection, dependency analysis, history browsing, cancellation, resets, exports, and server control. Use when the user invokes !status, !logs, !inspect, !deps, !history, !cancel, !cancel-safe, !reset, !start, !stop, !guide, !update_dashboard, or !export. argument-hint: <command> [args] user-invocable: true --- The file is 56 lines long and should be treated as a knowledge/control-plane source rather than application code.
gotchas: Guide description may be narrow: `!guide` remains a command-decision aid, but the app also exposes an in-app markdown Guide modal backed by documentation/guide via GuideService and IPC.
patterns: Skill-definition pattern: trigger guidance first, then workflow steps and referenced protocol files; these files are loaded on demand by Claude Code.
Uses markdown tables for compact command, file, or option matrices.
conventions: Markdown headings use a single H1 followed by H2/H3 sections for navigable documentation.
Agent-control documents use `{tracker_root}`, `{project_root}`, and `{dashboardId}` placeholders instead of machine-specific paths.
ASCII double hyphen is used in prose where many docs avoid Unicode punctuation for terminal readability.
